title: If It's Smart, It's Vulnerable
html: Stub. Book by Mikko Hyppönen surveying the convergence of AI, IoT, and security. Yahir captured four sequential page screenshots on 2025-06-04 covering the AI chapter (Deep Blue / Kasparov, narrow vs general intelligence, the wolverines parable from Jufo Peltomaa, F-Secure's 2005 ML lab), the ad-monetization-of-attention chapter (MIT WhatsApp $600/mo study, Facebook $190/user ad ARPU vs hypothetical $16/mo subscription), and the Tesla chapter (EV reputation reset, Model X SUV stunts).

related.label: Hyppönen — *If It's Smart, It's Vulnerable* AI chapter (Deep Blue / Kasparov / 'unnatural intelligence')
Hyppönen — MIT's $600/mo WhatsApp study, Facebook ARPU math, and why Tesla feels revolutionary
Hyppönen — narrow vs wide AI, F-Secure's 2005 ML lab, and the 'just switch it off' fallacy
Hyppönen — the wolverines parable (Jufo Peltomaa) + AI taking warehouse jobs
